title: Mailchimp Audience (List)
description: A Mailchimp audience (also known as a list). Audiences contain subscribers who have opted in to receive correspondence from you or your organization. They hold contact information, segmentation data, campaign defaults, and compliance settings.

id.description: A string that uniquely identifies this list.

web_id.description: The ID used in the Mailchimp web application.

contact.description: Contact information displayed in campaign footers to comply with international spam laws.

company.description: The company name for the list.

address1.description: The street address for the list contact.

address2.description: The second line of the street address.

city.description: The city for the list contact.

state.description: The state for the list contact.

zip.description: The postal or zip code for the list contact.

country.description: A two-character ISO 3166 country code. Defaults to US if invalid.

phone.description: The phone number for the list contact.

permission_reminder.description: The permission reminder for the list, reminding subscribers how they signed up.

use_archive_bar.description: Whether campaigns for this list use the Archive Bar in archives by default.

campaign_defaults.description: Default values for campaigns created for this list.

from_name.description: The default from name for campaigns sent to this list.

from_email.description: The default from email for campaigns sent to this list.

subject.description: The default subject line for campaigns sent to this list.

language.description: The default language for this list's forms.

notify_on_subscribe.description: The email address to send subscribe notifications to. Set to empty string to disable.

notify_on_unsubscribe.description: The email address to send unsubscribe notifications to. Set to empty string to disable.

date_created.description: The date and time that this list was created in ISO 8601 format.

list_rating.description: An auto-generated activity score for the list (0-5).

email_type_option.description: Whether the list supports multiple email formats (HTML and plain-text). When true, subscribers can choose their preferred format.

subscribe_url_short.description: The URL-shortened version of this list's subscribe form.

subscribe_url_long.description: The full version of this list's subscribe form URL.

beamer_address.description: The list's Email Beamer address for creating campaigns via email.

visibility.description: Legacy visibility setting. No longer used.

double_optin.description: Whether to require the subscriber to confirm subscription via email.

has_welcome.description: Whether this list has a welcome automation connected.

marketing_permissions.description: Whether the list has marketing permissions (GDPR) enabled.

modules.description: Any list-specific modules installed for this list.

stats.description: Stats for the list, including subscriber counts and campaign performance.

member_count.description: The number of active members in the list.

total_contacts.description: The number of contacts in the list, including subscribed, unsubscribed, pending, cleaned, and transactional contacts.

unsubscribe_count.description: The number of members who have unsubscribed from the list.

cleaned_count.description: The number of members cleaned from the list (hard bounced).

member_count_since_send.description: The number of active members in the list since the last campaign was sent.

unsubscribe_count_since_send.description: The number of members who have unsubscribed since the last campaign was sent.

cleaned_count_since_send.description: The number of members cleaned from the list since the last campaign was sent.

campaign_count.description: The number of campaigns in any status that use this list.

campaign_last_sent.description: The date and time the last campaign was sent to this list in ISO 8601 format.

merge_field_count.description: The number of merge fields for this list (not including EMAIL).

avg_sub_rate.description: The average number of subscriptions per month for the list.

avg_unsub_rate.description: The average number of unsubscriptions per month for the list.

target_sub_rate.description: The target number of subscriptions per month for the list to keep it growing.

open_rate.description: The average open rate (a percentage represented as a number between 0 and 100) per campaign for the list.

click_rate.description: The average click rate (a percentage represented as a number between 0 and 100) per campaign for the list.

last_sub_date.description: The date and time of the last subscribe in ISO 8601 format.

last_unsub_date.description: The date and time of the last unsubscribe in ISO 8601 format.
